overall.description: A static camera shot of a medieval stone fireplace with a roaring fire in a fantasy game environment. A translucent ghostly figure appears on the left side, fading in and out of visibility while moving around the room, creating a supernatural atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a medieval stone fireplace with a warm roaring fire illuminating the room. The carved wooden architrave frames the hearth, with iron tools and a hanging cauldron nearby. A translucent ghostly figure appears on the left side, fading in and out of existence while moving around the space, creating an eerie supernatural atmosphere in the otherwise quiet hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective of a cozy medieval hearth that gradually transforms into a scene of supernatural unrest. It begins with a warm, roaring fire illuminating a stone fireplace, framed by a carved wooden architrave and flanked by iron tools and a hanging cauldron. As the flickering light fills the quiet hall, a translucent ghostly figure emerges on the left side of the frame. The atmosphere then shifts from domestic warmth to an eerie tension as the spirit fades in and out of existence while drifting through the space.
